description: Case memory tests - verify the system can store, retrieve, and search past treatment plans
_comment: IMPORTANT: These tests verify that the system correctly handles case memory operations. The system should use the case_memory tool when users explicitly ask to save/search/retrieve cases. Do NOT expect tool names in responses - expect confirmation of the action taken.

cases.input: Save this prostate plan as a case for future reference
cases._comment: User asks to save a plan. System should confirm the save action with relevant details.

cases.input: Find me similar prostate cancer cases from the past
cases._comment: User asks to search for similar cases. System should present search results.

cases.input: What treatment plans have we done for cervical cancer before?
cases._comment: User asks about past cervical cancer cases. System should present relevant cases.

cases.input: Show me the statistics of all our past treatment plans
cases._comment: User asks for statistics. System should present summary statistics.

cases.input: Based on similar past cases, what seed count do you recommend for this prostate case?
cases._comment: User asks for recommendation based on past cases. System should provide evidence-based recommendation.

cases.input: 我之前做过一个肝癌的plan，帮我找出来
cases._comment: Chinese user asks to find a past liver cancer case. System should respond in Chinese.

cases.input: 这个病例的V100达到了98%，帮我存档
cases._comment: Chinese user asks to archive a case with V100=98%. System should confirm the archive action.
User asks to list all cases. System should present the case list.
User asks to retrieve a specific case. System should present the case details.

cases.input: Compare my current plan with similar past cases
cases._comment: User asks to compare current plan with past cases. System should provide comparison analysis.
